sources.name: VoltAgent Awesome Agent Skills
sources.notes: Hand-picked index of official and community SKILL.md repositories across Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and related agents.

sources.name: AgentSkills.me
sources.notes: Browseable directory with concrete skill pages, popularity signals, source repositories, tool filters, and SKILL.md paths.

sources.name: Superpowers Skills
sources.notes: Popular workflow skill set centered on agent discipline: brainstorming, TDD, debugging, planning, verification, review, and parallel execution.

sources.name: Official Skills
sources.notes: Public pages linked by the VoltAgent index for official skills from Anthropic, Vercel, Stripe, Cloudflare, OpenAI, Hugging Face, and others.

buckets.name: Agent Workflow and Superpowers
buckets.summary: Named skills that improve how an agent plans, verifies, recovers context, and collaborates with humans.

items.name: superpowers/using-superpowers
items.description: Routes each task through relevant skills before answering or editing.

items.name: superpowers/brainstorming
items.description: Turns open-ended feature ideas into reviewed designs before implementation.

items.name: superpowers/test-driven-development
items.description: Requires red-green-refactor implementation with failing tests before production code.

items.name: superpowers/systematic-debugging
items.description: Frames failures around evidence, reproduction, hypothesis testing, and root cause.

items.name: superpowers/verification-before-completion
items.description: Prevents completion claims until direct verification commands have run.

items.name: session-handoff
items.description: Creates durable handoff documents for long-running agent sessions and context transfers.

buckets.name: Engineering Execution
buckets.summary: Skills that directly support codebase work, dependency changes, commits, reviews, and multi-agent coding workflows.

items.name: codex
items.description: Runs Codex CLI for code analysis, refactoring, and automated editing.

items.name: gemini
items.description: Runs Gemini CLI for large-context code review, planning, and analysis.

items.name: dependency-updater
items.description: Detects project dependency managers and applies safe dependency updates.

items.name: commit-work
items.description: Stages intended changes, splits commits, and writes clear commit messages.

items.name: superpowers/subagent-driven-development
items.description: Coordinates independent implementation slices across parallel coding agents.

buckets.name: Frontend and Product Experience
buckets.summary: Real named skills for UI quality, framework best practices, frontend testing, product content, and design systems.

items.name: vercel-react-best-practices
items.description: Applies React and Next.js performance patterns from Vercel Engineering.

items.name: frontend-design
items.description: Creates distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces.

items.name: web-design-guidelines
items.description: Captures modern responsive layout, accessibility, and visual hierarchy rules.

items.name: webapp-testing
items.description: Tests local web applications with browser automation.

items.name: shadcn-ui
items.description: Guides shadcn component usage for modern web UI work.

buckets.name: Documents, Research, and Data
buckets.summary: Named skills for office documents, external research, scraping, data tools, and model/data discovery.

items.name: anthropics/docx
items.description: Creates, edits, and analyzes Word documents.

items.name: anthropics/xlsx
items.description: Creates, edits, and analyzes spreadsheets.

items.name: firecrawl/firecrawl-build-search
items.description: Integrates query-first web discovery with optional content hydration.

items.name: huggingface/hf-cli
items.description: Uses the Hugging Face Hub CLI for model, dataset, and Space workflows.

items.name: arxiv-search
items.description: Searches and summarizes arXiv papers for research tasks.

buckets.name: Platform and Domain Skills
buckets.summary: Product-specific skills with clear sources that can inform future Gaia composites or known-agent mappings.

items.name: stripe/stripe-best-practices
items.description: Guides Stripe integration decisions and implementation patterns.

items.name: cloudflare/workers-best-practices
items.description: Captures Cloudflare Workers runtime and deployment patterns.

items.name: netlify/netlify-deploy
items.description: Deploys and troubleshoots Netlify applications.

items.name: better-auth/create-auth
items.description: Creates authentication setup with Better Auth.

items.name: veniceai/venice-chat
items.description: Builds chat completions, multimodal inputs, tool calls, and streaming against Venice APIs.
